name: Maximum Ward
text: All players must roll a die each turn. If the result of all die match, all cards on the field are destroyed. If this effect occurs, send this card to the cemetery.

condition.text: Each turn, all players roll 1D6; if all results match, destroy all cards on the field.

effects.actionText: All players roll; matching results destroy the field
effects.value: If all players' die results match, destroy all cards on the field and send Maximum Ward to the cemetery

duration.text: Each turn while field effect is active

params.valueText: If all players' die results match, destroy all cards on the field and send Maximum Ward to the cemetery

condition.text: Each turn, all players roll 1D6; if all results match, destroy all cards on the field.

duration.text: Each turn while field effect is active

effects.notes: Requires a multiplayer-capable all-players turn-start roll resolver and a destroy-all-cards-on-field routine.

notes: Infinite Field promo. Card text says 'all die match'; modeled as all participating players' 1D6 results matching.
